mapper.delete: DELETE FROM favorite_properties WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND property_id = #{propertyId}
mapper.select: SELECT f.id AS id, f.property_id AS propertyId, p.property_name AS title, p.region_name AS region, p.sigungu AS sigungu, p.road_name AS road, p.min_deposit_amount AS minDepositAmount, p.max_deposit_amount AS maxDepositAmount, p.min_monthly_rent_amount AS minMonthlyRentAmount, p.max_monthly_rent_amount AS maxMonthlyRentAmount, p.min_trade_amount AS minTradeAmount, p.max_trade_amount AS maxTradeAmount, f.created_at AS createdAt FROM favorite_properties f JOIN properties p ON f.property_id = p.id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY f.created_at DESC
